channel.title: Comments on: The Bruery: Autumn Maple, Ep. 83
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description:
Oh Travis you should! Make a special trip for it. There are a couple hotels right there so no worries about getting home from the tasting room!
I had a great visit a couple weeks ago. The folks there are great!!
David
item.content:encoded:
Oh Travis you should! Make a special trip for it. There are a couple hotels right there so no worries about getting home from the tasting room!

I had a great visit a couple weeks ago. The folks there are great!!

David

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: The Bruery is making some pretty nice beers, The way they are bottling certainly gives them a "high end" profile, but what's in the bottle backs that up. Good stuff!
item.content:encoded: The Bruery is making some pretty nice beers, The way they are bottling certainly gives them a “high end” profile, but what’s in the bottle backs that up. Good stuff!

item.title: By: Travis
item.dc:creator: Travis
item.description: I was just down south and checked out Hangar 24. I wish I had time to go to The Bruery. Next time....next time...
item.content:encoded: I was just down south and checked out Hangar 24. I wish I had time to go to The Bruery. Next time….next time…
